name: Remove-PSDrive

options.name: -LiteralName
options.description: Specifies the name of the drive.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies the names of the drives to remove. Do not type a colon (`:`) after the drive name.

options.name: -PSProvider
options.description: Specifies an array of PSProvider objects. This cmdlet removes and disconnects all of the drives associated with the specified PowerShell provider.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Specifies a scope for the drive. The acceptable values for this parameter are: `Global`, `Local`, and `Script`, or a number relative to the current scope. Scopes number `0` through the number of scopes. The current scope number is `0` and its parent is `1`. For more information, see about_Scopes (../Microsoft.PowerShell.Core/About/about_Scopes.md).

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.

description: Deletes temporary PowerShell drives and disconnects mapped network drives.
